title: Senior Project Manager — Offshore Wind Farm Balance of Plant (Contract)
description_raw:
Wood Group are recruiting a Senior Project Manager to lead the balance of plant (BoP) mechanical scope on a major 400MW offshore wind farm development in the North Sea. The role is outside IR35, engaged via your own limited company.

The BoP mechanical package covers offshore substation platform topside structural and mechanical systems, inter-array cable pull-in interfaces, and monopile secondary steel.

Key responsibilities:
- Lead the BoP mechanical package from detailed design through to offshore installation and commissioning
- Administer NEC3 ECC Option C contracts with steel fabricators and offshore installation contractors
- Report monthly to the Wind Farm Programme Director on CPI, SPI, and earned value metrics
- Coordinate with the offshore transport and installation (T&I) contractor on jack-up vessel scheduling
- Own mechanical ITRs and clear punch lists prior to offshore sailing

Profile:
- BEng / MEng Mechanical or Structural Engineering
- 12+ years offshore wind or oil and gas project management
- NEC3/4 ECC contract administration experience essential
- BOSIET/HUET mandatory
- Familiarity with wind turbine installation interface requirements desirable

Rate: £750/day outside IR35
Duration: 20 months
Start: ASAP
Location: Edinburgh (office) + offshore rotations during installation campaign
